paragraphs: Pedro Ripper is co-founder and CEO of Bemobi (BMOB3), a Brazilian public technology company with operations in more than 50 countries. He has led the company's evolution from mobile services into a digital payments and software platform serving large enterprises.

Before Bemobi, Pedro held senior executive roles at Promon, Cisco Systems, and Oi. He earned his degree in Computer Engineering and his Master's in Software Engineering from PUC-Rio, and later completed executive education programs at Harvard Business School and Singularity University.

Pedro currently serves on the boards of Iguatemi and Smart Fit, and previously served on the boards of Positivo Tecnologia and Vibra Energia. He is also co-founder, board member, and shareholder of Akross, a specialized software company.
Based in Rio de Janeiro. Father of three.

highlights.title: Public Company CEO
highlights.description: Leading Bemobi (BMOB3), listed on Brazil's B3 stock exchange, through growth, transformation, and international expansion.

highlights.title: Global Footprint
highlights.description: Operating in more than 50 countries, with digital payments and software solutions for large enterprises.

highlights.title: Boards & Investments
highlights.description: Current board roles at Iguatemi and Smart Fit, previous roles at Positivo Tecnologia and Vibra Energia, and co-founder and board member of Akross.
